title: Company Names Tribunal decision: AXA Erance Iard Ltd Ltd
body: "Application number 5398  Applicant AXA objected to the name used by AXA Erance Iard Ltd Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 30 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of AXA Erance Iard Ltd Ltd is changed to 16400326, Ltd. "
